_comment: Copy this file to intake/inspections.json and fill with records collected manually (OPRA / web lookup / PDF / email) for the no-API jurisdictions (DC, Newark, Bergen, Florida, current SF). Re-run `npm run prep:build`. Records start unreviewed (reviewed:false) — set reviewed:true only after QA verifies. Leave unknown fields null; NEVER fabricate.
englishViolationSummary: Multiple priority violations: cross-contamination; handwashing sink blocked.

regulatoryAgency: Newark Dept. of Health & Community Wellness
recommendedAction: Submit OPRA request; online DB unavailable — do NOT record as 'no inspection'.
